title.rendered: Groots met een zachte G – Guus Meeuwis

content.rendered:
Guus Meeuwis is one of the greatest music artists in The Netherlands. He has been in de music business for more than 22 years and is selling out stadion concerts since 2006. ‘Groots met een zachte G’ is an annual event of Guus Meeuwis at Philips Stadion. ‘Groots’ also has other variations like ‘Groots met een zachte G – De Wintereditie’ at Ziggodome Amsterdam and ‘Groots Overzee’ at Texel and Curaçao.

Lighting cables for the ultimate experience

Marco Driessen designed every light show for ‘Groots met een zachte G’. While creating a light design, Marco gets inspired by the set design and its flow. “It’s important to invigorate the set by using its elements and contours.” Marco says. Every year the light show is different, but it always has a certain feel to it. “To create an cozy ambiance I use lighting cables in my designs, it’s the key element for Groots met een zachte G.”

PERFECTLY BALANCED

Every edition of Groots met een zachte G has been a great success so far. Their secret? According to Marco all disciplines must be perfectly balanced to create the ultimate experience. “Groots met een zachte G works with an amazing team and every year I am proud to be a part of it. Together we create the ultimate show.”

WANT TO WORK TOGETHER? CONTACT US

info@theartoflight.nl
+31 (0) 40 780 5026
